title: 10 health benefits of Calendula arvensis (pot marigold)
intro: Calendula arvensis has health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant's medicinal properties include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory compounds, which work together to calm irritated skin and promote tissue repair. For example, calendula ointments can help alleviate symptoms of eczema, acne, and rosacea, improving the quality of life for those suffering from these conditions by reducing itching, redness, and discomfort.
